blended.narrative: Montana Snowbowl is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,560 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 68".
